name: Galaxy Defense Robot Orbital 7
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＤ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギャラクシーディフェンス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロボ・オービタル <ruby lang="jp"><rb>７</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セブン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute this card from your hand or field; take 1 "Photon" monster and 1 "Galaxy" monster from your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, and send the other to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. If a "Galaxy-Eyes" monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Galaxy Defense Robot Orbital 7" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card from your hand or field; take 1 "Photon" monster and 1 "Galaxy" monster from your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, and send the other to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. You can only use each effect of "Galaxy Defense Robot Orbital 7" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card from your hand or field; take 1 "Photon" monster and 1 "Galaxy" monster from your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, and send the other to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT monsters. action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
